subject: Status review: guppy milestone in Auckland | Albert Einstein | Q4 review | INIT-5681
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of guppy work in Auckland. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Publish a draft checklist for approvals, compliance, and rollout. Publish a draft checklist for approvals, compliance, and rollout. Comparative note includes Albert Einstein and Albert Einstein as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-5681.
